text.title: CSS-in-JS Advanced Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply CSS-in-JS Advanced end-to-end against a single input bundle. Each step has explicit input/action/output; gates between steps surface human-review points before binding actions.

step.name: frame-constraints
step.action: List constraints: SSR/RSC, bundle budget, theme strategy, atomic vs monolithic.

step.name: evaluate-libs
step.action: Score 3 candidates (1 runtime, 2 zero-runtime) against constraints.

step.name: decide
step.action: Pick library; document rationale + rejected alternatives.

step.name: wire-ssr
step.action: Implement critical-CSS extraction; verify with Lighthouse FCP.

step.name: theme-impl
step.action: Implement theme switching; smoke-test light/dark + per-tenant variant.

step.name: verify-rsc
step.action: If RSC, document client-boundary rules; smoke-test pages.
